title: Software Update - DFU - Three easy steps screen
scenario: "Start Update" button is missing or inactive on the "Three easy steps" screen during software update flow in Device Settings
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Observe the 'Three easy steps' title screen with picture and textual instructions
expected: The 'Start Update' button is available and active (tappable) on the 'Three easy steps' screen.
